commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=be8789b2e85dae667b7ea8d1b5f6bda6a534f8c7)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds core configured-model/list handling for stale Anthropic Claude 4 text-only rows, tests the configured `models list` path, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main's default `models list` path can skip registry loading and `toFallbackConfiguredListModel` still returns `input: ["text"]` for a configured `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5` default. I did not run the CLI because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer or contributor revision because the remaining blocker is an ownership-boundary fix on the PR branch, not a current-main close candidate.

target.title: fix(anthropic): preserve configured Claude image capability
target.body:
## Summary
- normalize stale text-only Anthropic/Claude 4 catalog rows to text+image in the core configured model input path
- keep configured/default `models list` rows aligned with the same Anthropic Claude 4 image-capability normalization
- cover `claude-sonnet-4-5` configured/local catalog behavior while preserving text-only older Claude rows
- add changelog entry

## Real behavior proof
- **Behavior addressed:** A configured default model such as `agents.defaults.model = "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5"` could still resolve through a stale text-only configured/catalog path, causing image input to be treated as unsupported even after the provider-discovered row fix.
- **Real environment tested:** Local OpenClaw checkout on macOS, PR head `be8789b2e8`, using an isolated `OPENCLAW_HOME=/private/tmp/openclaw-83756-proof` and `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=/private/tmp/openclaw-83756-proof/.openclaw/openclaw.json` with only `agents.defaults.model` set to `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5`.
- **Exact steps or command run after the patch:**
  ```sh
  env OPENCLAW_HOME=/private/tmp/openclaw-83756-proof \
    OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=/private/tmp/openclaw-83756-proof/.openclaw/openclaw.json \
    PATH=/Users/andy/.cache/codex-runtimes/codex-primary-runtime/dependencies/node/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin \
    pnpm openclaw models list --json
  ```
- **Evidence after fix:** Terminal output from the real OpenClaw CLI after the patch:
  ```json
  {
    "count": 1,
    "models": [
      {
        "key": "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5",
        "name": "claude-sonnet-4-5",
        "input": "text+image",
        "contextWindow": 200000,
        "local": false,
        "available": false,
        "tags": [
          "default"
        ],
        "missing": false
      }
    ]
  }
  ```
- **Observed result after fix:** The configured default Anthropic Claude 4 row now reports `input: "text+image"` instead of text-only, so the configured/default path preserves native image capability before request sanitization can drop image inputs.
- **What was not tested:** I did not make a live Anthropic API request. This proof covers the local configured model capability resolution and CLI-visible configured/default path that the reporter identified; the live provider call still depends on valid Anthropic credentials.

## Validation
- `pnpm test src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/model.inline-provider.test.ts src/commands/models.list.e2e.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 CHANGELOG.md src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/model.inline-provider.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/model.inline-provider.test.ts src/commands/models/list.rows.ts src/commands/models.list.e2e.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

Follow-up for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/83756#issuecomment-4487709808.
